title: French Melon Salad
description: A refreshing and light French-inspired salad made with melon, Polish sausage, and a hint of daring flavors.

ingredients.name: Salad
ingredients.notes: such as mixed greens or arugula

instructions: 2. Grill the Polish sausage for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
3. Let the sausage rest for 2-3 minutes before slicing.
4. In a large bowl, combine the sliced sausage, diced melon, and mixed greens.
5. In a small bowl, whisk together the lemon juice and daring spices.
6. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss to combine.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
